findings.message: surface.en 'Shareholders Meeting' is a common shorthand but the legally precise Japanese term (会社法) renders as 'General Meeting of Shareholders' (株主総会). Acceptable for ITP level; no correction required unless exam uses formal phrasing.

definition.en renders '株主の意向を決める場' as 'A forum for determining shareholders' intentions.' This misframes the body as a consultative forum rather than the supreme decision-making organ of a joint-stock company (会社法 §295). The JP text itself qualifies it with 'sometimes described as the highest decision-making body' — that hedging is exam-appropriate, but the EN lead sentence should at minimum say 'the forum where shareholders' resolutions (voting decisions) are made' to avoid educator confusion.

Table row 4, cell[0].jp contains 'エステイジーズ SDGs'. 'エステイジーズ' is an incorrect/garbled kana reading of 'SDGs' — the accepted Japanese pronunciation is 'エス・ディー・ジーズ'. This appears to be an OCR or MT artifact. The standalone term entry (p033::6) correctly omits the erroneous kana, making the table inconsistent with the term entity on the same page. FAIL: incorrect Japanese text in a learner-facing table cell; will cause pronunciation confusion.

definition.jp/zh/en for HRテック contain inline page-reference anchors '(p.129)' and '(p.160)'. These are meaningful in a printed book but may render as dead references in digital/flashcard output. No semantic error; flagged for downstream rendering review.

definition for '組織形態' is circular across all three languages: JP '経営組織の形態のことを「組織形態」といいます', ZH '经营组织的形态被称为"组织形态"', EN 'The form of a management organization is called "organizational form."' Zero additional information is conveyed. A learner gains nothing from this entry. Should at minimum reference the four sub-types (職能別/事業部制/マトリックス/プロジェクト).

definition for 'システム' equates it solely to 'ハードウェアとソフトウェア' (hardware and software). At ITP level, システム in the context of 業務システム includes people (ヒト), procedures, and technology together. Restricting the definition to HW+SW may cause exam errors when questions ask about 業務とシステムの関係. The contextual note ('スマホの中のアプリ') is reader-friendly but reinforces the HW+SW-only framing. WARN: pedagogically incomplete, may lead to wrong answers on ITP exam questions about system scope.

Both '事業' (p038::2) and '業務' (p038::3) render their zh surface as '业务'. In Chinese IT terminology, 事業≈企业业务/事业 and 業務≈操作/业务流程 have distinct meanings. Mapping both to identical ZH surface '业务' will cause confusion for ZH readers and breaks the within-page consistency rule. Suggested: '事业' or '事业线' for 事業, retaining '业务' for 業務.

caption.zh '业务、操作与系统的关系' translates 業務 as '操作' here, but on p038::3 the same term 業務 has zh surface '业务'. Minor within-corpus ZH inconsistency (操作 vs 业务 for 業務). Acceptable at INFO level; if a glossary enforces a single ZH rendering for 業務, one of the two should be updated.

definition for '職能別組織' on p039 is factually incorrect. JP: '事業が1つしかなく、経営者が意思決定を行う組織形態' describes a single-business owner-managed firm, NOT a Functional Organization. The standard ITP definition of 職能別組織 is an organization grouped by specialized function (e.g., sales, manufacturing, accounting departments) — as correctly stated on p038::0 and p041::3. ZH and EN translations faithfully reproduce this error. FAIL: a learner studying this entry will have the wrong concept for a directly exam-testable term. Release-impacting.
Table CEO row definition contains inline page references '(p.22)' in EN/ZH. Same rendering concern as F-036-001: may be dead links in non-paginated digital output.
